required_preferences.fact: Uses video calls for both idea generation and approvals when collaborating with remote partners — no longer waits for in-person sessions

supersedes.fact: Prefers in-person collaboration for new ideas — only uses video calls for final approvals

required_preferences.fact: Stays home to care for Willow whenever artist’s block hits, using indoor activities for inspiration instead of spontaneous day trips

supersedes.fact: Goes on spontaneous day trips along the Oregon Coast when artist’s block hits, never stays home in those moments

required_preferences.fact: Volunteers as an arts-and-crafts instructor at the local community center once a month
Schedules joint morning walks in her neighborhood with her partner before starting work when possible
Explores Portland’s botanical gardens monthly for inspiration — never visits the same garden twice in a row
Establishes a shared weekly cleaning ritual with her partner to maintain order in the larger apartment, alternating primary cleaning tasks

persona: A freelance graphic designer who sells custom prints online
